https://openalex.org/W4407702228.kf1: Reflective career chapter on how macro forces (policy, ideology) and micro interactions intersected across the author's research on immigration, poverty reduction, and forced displacement.

https://openalex.org/W4411015747.kf1: After four years, monthly unconditional cash transfers had no statistically significant impacts on children's language, executive function, social-emotional, or brain-activity outcomes (NBER working-paper version).

https://openalex.org/W4408220320.demographics: Educators and students under state education-restriction policies
https://openalex.org/W4408220320.kf1: Documents how Florida's state-policy-driven education restrictions limit access to ideas and supports related to race, gender, and LGBTQ+ existence, serving as a national warning sign.

https://openalex.org/W4412699679.kf1: Adolescents viewed school (not family) as the central arena of gender socialization and reported consistent gender-differential treatment by teachers (boys harsher/more demanding, girls lenient/lighter).

https://openalex.org/W7125434327.kf1: Data deposit of supplemental files for manuscripts from the Baby's First Years study.

https://openalex.org/W7162449400.kf1: Data deposit of supplemental files for the Baby's First Years study (duplicate record).

https://openalex.org/W7126044518.demographics: Low-income mothers across neighborhood opportunity contexts
https://openalex.org/W7126044518.kf1: Parents in lower-opportunity neighborhoods who received larger cash transfers engaged children in more enriching activities and purchased more child-focused goods, suggesting compensatory caregiving investment.
https://openalex.org/W7126044518.effect_sizes: Effect sizes .12 and .09 more per 1 SD decrease in neighborhood opportunity

https://openalex.org/W7125667541.kf1: Preprint: four years of cash transfers showed no impact on the primary brain-activity index; exploratory analysis found higher alpha power in the high-cash group needing replication.
https://openalex.org/W7125667541.effect_sizes: Higher alpha power in high-cash group (exploratory)

https://openalex.org/W7130574013.setting: New York City public schools (middle school)
https://openalex.org/W7130574013.intervention_name: The Listening with Curiosity Project (26-lesson SEL curriculum)
https://openalex.org/W7130574013.kf1: Improved listening and interpersonal curiosity were associated with greater connection to others and common humanity, and connection related to heightened academic engagement, with some gender differences.

https://openalex.org/W4404994669.kf1: Scoping review found growth in quantity and quality of research at the intersection of autism and gender diversity since 2018, while methodological improvements and stakeholder collaboration are still needed.

https://openalex.org/W4408365160.kf1: Discusses openness and transparency in peer review, including open peer review as a way to level the field for less-privileged scholars and detect misconduct.

https://openalex.org/W4400100909.kf1: Children with intellectual disabilities requiring AAC acquired phonological awareness and decoding skills through systematic evidence-based reading material delivered by trained teachers.

https://openalex.org/W4415975664.sample_size: Norwegian Mother, Father and Child Cohort (MoBa) / Language-8 study
https://openalex.org/W4415975664.age_0_8: Children at 18 and 36 months, followed to age 8.5
https://openalex.org/W4415975664.kf1: Early joint attention and social responsiveness at 18-36 months significantly predicted pragmatic language competence at age 8.5, marking pragmatics as a transdiagnostic developmental vulnerability.
